hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/handoff.md"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo "An existing handoff.md was found for this worktree. Read it now to restore context before continuing:"; echo; cat "$f"; fi

input=$(cat); tp=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty'); if [ -n "$tp" ] && [ -f "$tp" ]; then d="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.handoff-backups"; mkdir -p "$d"; cp "$tp" "$d/transcript-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).jsonl"; fi
